plugins.name: warden
plugins.description: Smart command safety filter with Python code scanning

plugins.name: claude-checkup
plugins.description: Health-check and audit skills for Claude Code: security, permissions, hooks, settings, MCP, plugins, memory, sessions, plus an orchestrator that runs them all and produces a remediation plan

plugins.name: strunk
plugins.description: Code-craft skills for Claude Code: idiomatic patterns and disciplined testing for Python, Rust, and Svelte

plugins.name: git-ferry

plugins.name: aegis
plugins.description: PreToolUse safety net: five hooks that block bash-over-tool, dev/local redirects, suppression markers, weakened linter configs, and non-conventional commits.
